parameters.name: search_terms
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify(['property for sale', 'house for sale', 'apartment for sale', 'plot for sale']) }}

parameters.query: SELECT listing_id FROM properties WHERE source = 'facebook_marketplace' AND listing_id = '{{ $json.listing_id }}' LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO properties (listing_id, title, price, price_currency, bedrooms, bathrooms, property_type, suburb, city, province, url, source, description, agent_name, agent_phone, images, scraped_at, status)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.listing_id }}',
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.price }},
  '{{ $json.price_currency }}',
  {{ $json.bedrooms }},
  {{ $json.bathrooms }},
  '{{ $json.property_type }}',
  '{{ $json.suburb }}',
  '{{ $json.city }}',
  '{{ $json.province }}',
  '{{ $json.url }}',
  '{{ $json.source }}',
  '{{ $json.description.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.seller_name }}',
  '',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.images) }}',
  '{{ $json.scraped_at }}',
  '{{ $json.status }}'
)
RETURNING id, listing_id, title, price, created_at;
